mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS path lowers discount rates and supports equity valuation multiples, so a sustained decline in policy rates predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day S&P 500 forward returns are not positive in rate-cut periods more often than in non-cut periods, or if rolling 2-year rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL acceleration above recent trend raises inflation pressure, tightens real-rate expectations, and compresses equity multiples, implying negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation rate rises above its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-acceleration triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if signal IC is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE while PAYEMS stalls indicates labor-market deterioration and weaker household income growth, which should depress equity earnings expectations and produce negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if labor-deterioration triggers with flat PAYEMS do not precede negative 20-day returns, or if the joint signal loses significance after controlling for either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth in RSAFS signals resilient final demand and revenue momentum, supporting near-term equity performance over the next week through positive earnings revisions.
failure_condition: Reject if high RSAFS growth does not improve 5-day forward returns relative to baseline, or if the sign flips negative in more than one third of rolling evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO with weak HOUST indicates supply-side expansion without broad housing support, a pattern consistent with improving real activity that should lift equities over a quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is above its 3-month moving average while HOUST is below its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO-HOUST combination fails to generate positive 60-day returns, or if the interaction term is weaker than either proxy alone across rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST reflects weaker residential investment and softer demand for durable goods and credit-sensitive sectors, which should reduce S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if below-average housing starts are followed by positive 20-day returns in a majority of triggered cases, or if the effect disappears after accounting for broad market trend.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth turns negative and UNRATE is still rising, labor income momentum has broken down, so equities should underperform over the following 60 trading days as earnings forecasts are cut.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change turns negative while UNRATE is above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-breakdown signal does not predict negative 60-day returns, or if negative returns occur less often than random after the trigger fires.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening cycle, an elevated FEDFUNDS rate alongside accelerating CPIAUCSL pressures real financing costs and risk premiums, so S&P 500 returns should be negative over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate/high-inflation episodes are not followed by negative 5-day returns, or if the interaction adds no explanatory power beyond either series alone.
